rationale: Enterprise-grade operational software demands authority, speed, and extreme clarity. The Swiss archetype relies on stark white backgrounds, crisp 1px borders, and high-impact functional colors (Red/Blue/Green) rather than decorative gradients. For a tablet kiosk used by executives and staff, choices must be legible in under 2 seconds. For the dashboard, data density and rapid scanning are prioritized.

rules.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-gray-900

general.optical_alignment: Pad icons heavily to align optically with text centers.

kiosk_request_button.style: flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 p-6 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:border-blue-500 hover:shadow-md transition-all

dashboard_card.style: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-2

status_badge.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

forms_and_inputs.style: Shadcn default inputs, override rounded-md to match global border-radius. Focus rings MUST use #0055FF with high contrast.

icons.instructions: Use Duotone weight for massive Kiosk buttons to add premium feel without complexity. Use Regular or Bold weight for dashboard navigation and utility icons.

login_background.description: Modern office architecture interior to be used as a high-end subtle background for the staff login screen.

login_page.layout: Split screen or centered glass card over image. Use 'login_background' for the visual half or background.
login_page.kiosk_entry: Prominent PIN/QR entry for meeting rooms.

kiosk_tablet_interface.header: Room Name (Large H1), Current Time, 'How can we help you?' text.
kiosk_tablet_interface.body: Bento Grid of large categorical buttons (Beverages, IT Support, Cleaning, AC Control). Use Phosphor Duotone icons.
kiosk_tablet_interface.confirmation_modal: Full-screen or large centered modal with large green CheckCircle, expected ETA, and 'Close' button.

staff_dashboard.sidebar: Dark or highly contrasted light sidebar. Navigation items: Live Queue, Rooms, Analytics, Settings.
staff_dashboard.live_queue: Kanban style or dense data table showing active requests. Items must show: Room, Request Type, Time Elapsed (Mono font), Status (Badge).
staff_dashboard.timers: Color code elapsed time (Green < 5m, Yellow 5-15m, Red > 15m).

admin_panel.content: Settings for Rooms (Generate QR), Routing logic, Staff Roles.
admin_panel.analytics: Charts using Shadcn Chart components (Recharts). Bar charts for peak hours, Donut for request categories.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serifs for headings. Use Outfit for Headings and IBM Plex Sans for body.
The Tablet Kiosk interface must prioritize MASSIVE touch targets (min 160px height) and high-contrast readable text. Do not make standard web buttons for the kiosk.
Implement the Swiss & High-Contrast archetype. Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid whites, grays, and 1px borders.
For the staff dashboard, ensure timers use JetBrains Mono for perfect tabular alignment of numbers.
Use Phosphor icons. Kiosk gets Duotone style; Dashboard gets Regular.
Do not use generic placeholders. Use the Unsplash URLs provided in the media section.
Use standard Shadcn components for Dashboard tables, tabs, and forms, but apply 'rounded-lg' and tight borders.
All buttons and forms must include data-testid.
Remember this is a hybrid app: The tablet route (e.g., /room) should hide standard desktop navs and be purely app-like.
